protein_name: Scaffold protein that plays an essential role in cytoplasmic stress granule formation which acts as a platform for antiviral signaling. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: molecular condensate scaffold activity; mRNA binding; nucleic acid binding; protein binding; RNA binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: immune system process; innate immune response; mRNA transport; protein homooligomerization; stress granule assembly
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: G3BP stress granule assembly factor 2; G3BP-2; G3BP2; GAP SH3 domain-binding protein 2; GTPase activating protein (SH3 domain) binding protein 2; KIAA0660; Ras GTPase-activating protein-binding protein 2; Ras-GTPase activating protein SH3 domain-binding protein 2
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 5.41 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
